name: btc-tensor-lab
description: Orquestracao local via npm para frontend e backend em containers separados

scripts.startFront: docker compose -f docker-compose.frontend.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.frontend.yml up --build
scripts.restartAll: docker compose -f docker-compose.backend.yml -f docker-compose.frontend.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.backend.yml -f docker-compose.frontend.yml up --build
